title: Chosen Step
storyPurpose: Spark voluntarily returns beside Mira; no command; controlled Resonance activates.

panels.description: Back in battle night: Spark walks from cover to stand beside Mira — voluntary, deliberate. Mira does not grab or point.
Spark's glow steadies into controlled aura; Rift Resonance rings visible as soft orbiting motes (max 3).

grokPrompt: Original high-energy Western fantasy comic storytelling with dynamic panel composition, dramatic inked linework, richly painted colors, expressive character acting, and clear cinematic action. Original Riftwilds IP only. Warm earth greens, sandstone, timber, moss first; cyan rift energy and amber hearth as accents only. NO purple AI-fantasy default. NO Marvel/DC/Pokémon characters or logos. Riftwilds comic "Spark's Journey" Issue #2, STORY PAGE 21/25 — Chosen Step. Story purpose: Spark voluntarily returns beside Mira; no command; controlled Resonance activates. Layout: two-col. 2 panels with clear inked gutters. Panel 1 (p21a): Back in battle night: Spark walks from cover to stand beside Mira — voluntary, deliberate. Mira does not grab or point. Panel 2 (p21b): Spark's glow steadies into controlled aura; Rift Resonance rings visible as soft orbiting motes (max 3). Characters: mira-eggwarden. Creatures: . Spark design lock: Spark the Glowpup-line Riftborn hatchling: soft luminous fur, cyan-gold rift markings, large expressive eyes, small crystal growths, glowing-tip emotional tail, unstable glow when frightened, steadier aura when bonded; cute but original — not a franchise mascot. Environment: Riftwild Commons fringe. Time: dawn. Weather: post-storm clear. Lighting: soft dawn amber with cyan accents. Continuity: {"spark":{"emotion":"chosen courage","glow":"controlled bright","bond":"voluntary with Mira","resonance":3,"abilityReady":"Prismatic Burst"}} Leave empty balloon-safe and narration-safe negative space in upper/lower panel corners. NO readable text of any kind in the artwork.
negativePrompt: readable dialogue text, captions, logos, watermarks, page numbers, UI chrome, Marvel, DC, Pokémon, manga screentone trademarks, extra limbs, duplicate characters, missing companions, purple neon fantasy default, photoreal modern clothing, Pikachu lookalike
letteringInstructions: Standard speech + narration; keep tails off faces and Spark's eyes.
transcript: SPEECH (Mira Eggwarden): Okay. Together — if you want.
